Save useful content to favorites so it is easier to revisit later.","about_intro_start_title":"How to Start","about_intro_title":"About Aliolo","about_learn_discovery_desc":"Search, age filters, and source filters such as favorites, mine, and public library help you find the right content quickly.","about_learn_discovery_title":"Discovery and Filtering","about_learn_language_desc":"You can study content in different languages and adjust session settings in your profile to match your pace and current goals.","about_learn_language_title":"Language and Mode Flexibility","about_learn_media_desc":"Images, audio, and video can support recognition, pronunciation, and context when they are available in the learning content.","about_learn_media_title":"Media Support","about_learn_modes_desc":"Use Learn to build recognition and confidence, then switch to Test when you want stricter recall and faster review.","about_learn_modes_title":"Learn and Test","about_learn_title":"How You Learn","about_organize_collections_desc":"Collections combine multiple subjects into one study flow, which is useful for mixed review and curated sets.","about_organize_collections_title":"Collections","about_organize_creation_desc":"Creators can organize their own content, keep it private while working, or expose it through the public library when it is ready.","about_organize_creation_title":"Ownership and Visibility","about_organize_folders_desc":"Folders group related subjects inside a pillar so larger content sets stay manageable.","about_organize_folders_title":"Folders","about_organize_subjects_desc":"Subjects are the main unit of study. Correct answers wait 1s, while incorrect ones wait 2s to let you review.","doc_autoplay_title":"Auto-Play Learning","doc_card_scope_desc":"Cards are the building blocks of learning and always belong to a specific Subject. While you can organize Subjects into Folders or Collections, cards themselves must be created within a Subject.","doc_card_scope_title":"Where Cards Live","doc_collections_purpose_desc":"Collections are curated paths that group Subjects together. When you start a session from a Collection, the system mixes cards from all included subjects to provide a randomized, comprehensive test.","doc_collections_purpose_title":"The Purpose of Collections","doc_create_intro_desc":"This tab covers how creators organize content, localize it, and publish useful study material without overcomplicating the workflow.","doc_create_intro_title":"Create","doc_create_json_desc":"JSON-based creation is an advanced workflow for structured bulk content. It should remain optional; most creators should be able to build and edit content through the standard forms.","doc_create_json_title":"Advanced JSON Import","doc_create_localization_desc":"Localize content where it matters most: names, descriptions, prompts, and answers. Keep labels consistent across languages so users can switch study language without losing structure.","doc_create_localization_title":"Localization","doc_create_media_desc":"Images, audio, and video should support the learning goal, not distract from it. Add media when it improves recognition, pronunciation, or context, and keep cards usable even when media is missing.","doc_create_media_title":"Media Workflow","doc_create_model_desc":"Creators work inside pillars and organize material with folders, subjects, collections, and cards. Build the structure first, then fill it with localized prompts, answers, and optional media.","doc_create_model_title":"Content Model","doc_create_visibility_desc":"Use \"mine\" to work on your own content, favorites to pin useful items, and public library to browse shared material. Public visibility affects discovery, while ownership affects what you can edit or delete.","doc_create_visibility_title":"Ownership and Visibility","doc_creation_desc":"Create your own Subjects and add visual Flashcards. Each card supports an image and an optional audio file for pronunciation.","doc_creation_title":"Creating Subjects & Cards","doc_feedback_desc":"Help us improve! Use the feedback icon (Icons.feedback) on any Subject or Folder to report issues. You can also send general app feedback through the Support section.","doc_feedback_title":"Feedback System","doc_filters_desc":"Quickly find content using the search bar. You can filter by Age Group (Early to Advanced) or narrow your view to specific Collections and Folders.","doc_filters_title":"Search & Filters","doc_flashcards_desc":"Each subject contains a set of cards. While images and audio are supported, they are optional—content can be purely textual or dynamically generated.","doc_flashcards_title":"Visual Flashcards","doc_friends_desc":"Learning is better together! Invite friends to Aliolo through your profile. You can track each other's progress and stay motivated by seeing who maintains the longest streak.","doc_friends_title":"Friends & Invitations","doc_goals_desc":"Set your daily card completion target in the settings. Changes to your goal take effect starting the next day.","doc_goals_title":"Daily Goals","doc_json_desc":"Advanced creators can use JSON data to provide localized names and descriptions, making subjects accessible across all supported languages.","doc_json_title":"JSON Localization","doc_lang_desc":"Always select your preferred learning language in the top menu before selecting a subject. This ensures the correct audio and translations are loaded.","doc_lang_title":"Learning Language","doc_leaderboard_desc":"Compete with learners worldwide! Earn XP by completing card sessions and climb the ranks. Your position is updated in real-time as you master new subjects.","doc_leaderboard_title":"Global Leaderboard","doc_localization_details_desc":"The \"Global\" language is your primary fallback—it can be any language you choose. If you provide specific translations (like English or Spanish), they will override the Global data only when a user selects that specific UI language.","doc_localization_details_title":"How Localization Works","doc_localization_ui_desc":"To add localized data, simply tap the language code icon (e.g., EN, ES, FR) in the editor header. This allows you to provide specific names, descriptions, and card content for each supported language. The \"Global\" tab serves as the primary fallback if no specific translation is provided.","doc_localization_ui_title":"Adding Translations","doc_math_desc":"Mathematical subjects use specialized engines to generate card visualizations in real-time. These subjects feature unique learning and testing modes tailored to specific mathematical concepts, ensuring a more effective practice environment.","doc_math_title":"Mathematical Subjects","doc_media_desc":"To ensure fast sync, keep images under 5MB and audio files under 10MB.","doc_media_title":"Media Upload Limits","doc_organization_desc":"Use Folders to group related Subjects together. You can also create Collections to organize Subjects into curated paths.","doc_organization_title":"Organizing Content","doc_pillars_desc":"All content in Aliolo is organized into 8 foundational pillars: Academic & Professional, World, Nature, Human Body, Humanities, Leisure, Engineering, and Other. These categories provide a structured framework for all subjects across the platform.","doc_pillars_title":"The 8 Core Pillars","doc_public_desc":"Subjects can be private (visible only to you) or public. Public content is shared with the entire Aliolo community, allowing everyone to discover and learn from your creations.","doc_public_title":"Public vs Private","doc_start_dashboard_desc":"The dashboard is your main library. Use search to find content quickly, then combine source filters such as favorites, mine, and public library with age filters to reduce noise.","doc_start_dashboard_title":"Dashboard, Search, and Filters","doc_start_feedback_desc":"Use the feedback entry points across the app when something is wrong or unclear. Reports can include the current context, which makes content issues easier to review and fix.","doc_start_feedback_title":"Feedback and Help","doc_start_intro_desc":"Use this tab when you are learning how the dashboard, library, progress, and social features fit together.","doc_start_intro_title":"Getting Started","doc_start_progress_desc":"Your profile shows total XP, current streak, max streak, and daily goal progress. Session size and number of answers are also managed from the profile page.","doc_start_progress_title":"Progress and Goals","doc_start_quick_desc":"Pick a pillar on the dashboard, open a subject, and start with Learn. Use favorites and filters to narrow the library, then review your XP, streaks, and daily goal from your profile.","doc_start_quick_title":"Quick Start","doc_start_structure_desc":"Subjects hold cards. Folders group related content inside a pillar. Collections are curated sets that can combine multiple subjects for study and sharing.","doc_start_structure_title":"Subjects, Folders, and Collections","doc_streaks_desc":"Consistency is key! Complete your daily goal every day to build your streak. Don't miss a day, or the streak will reset.","doc_streaks_title":"Streak System","doc_study_how_desc":"Start with Learn when you are building recognition, then switch to Test when you want faster recall and stricter checking. Use shorter sessions for focused review and larger sessions for broader coverage.","doc_study_how_title":"How to Study","doc_study_intro_desc":"This tab explains how to move through content, choose the right mode, and tune your sessions for review or recall.","doc_study_intro_title":"Study","doc_study_media_desc":"When media is available, use it to reinforce pronunciation and recognition. They use the same content but support different pacing and answer expectations, so switch modes based on whether you are exploring or checking retention.","doc_study_modes_title":"Learn and Test Modes","doc_study_scope_desc":"Study can start from a single subject, a folder view, or a collection. Collections are useful when you want a mixed session across several subjects without leaving the current flow.","doc_study_scope_title":"Subjects, Folders, and Collections in Study","doc_sync_desc":"Your progress is automatically synced to the cloud.
